analysis.title: Analysis & Reports
case_analyzer.suggestion.both: To improve case airflow: check front and top fans, manage cables, make sure the exhaust fan is working. Increase case fan count if necessary.
case_analyzer.suggestion.cpu_only: Make sure the CPU cooler is properly mounted. Clean the front case filters.
case_analyzer.suggestion.good: Current cooling is adequate, continue regular cleaning.
case_analyzer.suggestion.gpu_only: Provide additional airflow to the GPU area. Consider a side panel fan or bottom fan addition.
case_analyzer.suggestion.hotspot: GPU hotspot delta {diff:.0f}°C is above normal, thermal paste replacement recommended.
case_analyzer.verdict.both: General airflow is insufficient. Check the exhaust fan and front intake fans.
case_analyzer.verdict.cpu_only: The CPU cooler may be insufficient. Check the front case air intake.
case_analyzer.verdict.gpu_only: The graphics card may not be getting enough air in the case. If GPU temperature is high while CPU is normal, this usually indicates the GPU's exhaust heat is trapped in the case.

doctor.rec_check_storage_speed: Check storage speed (consider switching from HDD to SSD)

doctor.rec_ssd_upgrade: Switch to SSD if not using one

engine.fallback.intro:
🖱️ I am a **hardware assistant** and can only help with computer hardware, temperature, performance, cooling and similar topics.

**Topics you can ask about:**
• Are my temperature values normal?
• Should I replace my thermal paste?
• Why are fans running so fast?
• What do you recommend for performance?
• What is hotspot, what is VRAM?
• CPU/GPU comparison

expert.title: Expert Tools
fault.rec_default: System appears healthy, perform regular maintenance.
fault.rec_dust: There may be a cooling issue due to dust buildup in the system. I recommend opening the case and cleaning the coolers and fans with compressed air. Especially clean the dust from GPU and CPU coolers.
fault.rec_fan_perf: There appears to be a fan performance issue. Check your fan curves. Make sure the CPU fan is working properly. If needed, review fan profiles in BIOS or adjust the GPU fan curve with MSI Afterburner.
fault.rec_sensor_error: Some sensor values cannot be read or appear as zero. This is usually a software issue. Try running the application as administrator or update LibreHardwareMonitor.
fault.rec_thermal_paste: Indicates thermal paste may be dried out. I recommend removing the GPU cooler and replacing the thermal paste. Use a high-quality paste like Arctic MX-6 or Thermal Grizzly Kryonaut.
game.suggestion_airflow: Check case airflow or consider thermal paste replacement.
game.suggestion_gpu_specific: Fan curve and paste maintenance are especially important for {gpu}.
game.suggestion_paste: Thermal paste replacement recommended. Check your fan curve.
game.unknown: A game is running — system monitored.
gpu.title: Graphics Card (GPU)
hardware_age.suggestion.paste_change: Thermal paste replacement may be considered.
hardware_age.suggestion.paste_old: CPU thermal paste may be old.
hardware_age.suggestion.upgrade: Your hardware is 5+ years old, consider upgrading.
health.summary.bad: System needs maintenance. Thermal paste replacement and cleaning recommended.
health.summary.good_cooling_note: GPU cooling slightly weaker than last month.
health.summary.ok: System is generally healthy but some areas need attention.
health.tip.cooling: Case airflow can be improved. Check cooler for dust.
health.tip.gpu: GPU temperatures are high. Thermal paste and pad replacement may be considered.
health.tip.ssd: SSD health should be monitored, make backups.

net.title: Network

notif.gpu.title: GPU Temperature Alert
notif.hotspot.title: GPU Hotspot Alert
notif.ram.title: RAM Usage Alert
notif.ssd.title: SSD Temperature Alert
notif.vram.title: VRAM Temperature Alert
notifications.title: Notifications
power.estimated_suggestion: Estimated values used because actual GPU power could not be read.
power.suggestion_high: GPU drawing more power than expected. Check thermal paste condition and fan curves. Undervolting may be considered.
power.suggestion_low: Power consumption lower than expected. This may be due to good cooling or low load.
profile.label: System User
room_temp.analysis: At this room temperature ({room:.0f}°C), {component} at {temp:.0f}°C {desc}. (Expected: ~{expected:.0f}°C, status: {status})
room_temp.disabled: Room temperature tracking is off. {component} temperature: {temp:.1f}°C.
settings.about:
{name} v{version}
Analyzes and comments on your hardware like a real computer technician.
settings.title: Settings
splash.title: AI-Powered Hardware Monitoring Assistant
ssd.title: SSD
threshold.analysis.above_critical: ⚠️ Above critical limit (%{pct:.0f})! Immediate action required!
threshold.analysis.approaching_critical: %{pct:.0f} approaching critical. Not abnormal, keep monitoring.
threshold.analysis.below_critical: %{pct:.0f} below critical limit, no action needed.
threshold.analysis.critical_level: At %{pct:.0f} of critical limit. Check cooling and airflow.
threshold.analysis.fan_not_running: Fan may not be running, check it.
threshold.analysis.very_close: Very close to critical (%{pct:.0f})! Thermal paste and cooler maintenance recommended.
tray.toast: Program is running in the background. I will track your temperatures and report gaming sessions.
trend.maintenance_months: {name} temperature is trending upward. Maintenance recommended within about {months} months.
trend.maintenance_ok: All components stable, no maintenance predicted.
trend.maintenance_soon: {name} temperature rising rapidly. Thermal maintenance may be needed soon.
trend.prediction_far: Even if this trend continues, reaching critical level will take a long time.
trend.prediction_months: If this trend continues, maintenance may be recommended within about {months} months.
trend.prediction_soon: If this trend continues, maintenance may be recommended within about 1 month.
trend.prediction_stable: Temperature is stable, no action needed.
